titleStmt.title: SII 38.18: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 18. (A.R. No. 18 of 1912.) KAYĀTTAR, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Kōdaṇḍarāmēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Sundara Pāṇḍya Year: 8. Śaka 1461, Vikāśi, Paṅguni 9 = The details of the date may roughly correspond to Thursday, March 6, 1539 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. It records that the officials of the treasury (śrī-paṇḍārak-kāriyañchayvārgaḷ) of Kodaṇḍarāmīsuram-uḍaiya-nayiṉār temple at Kasattāl alias Sundarapāṇḍya nallūr in Āśūr-nāḍu seemed to undertake the responsibility of burning a perpetual lamp with the interest on the gold received from an individual, Eṉṉaippeṟṟāḷu Tiruviḍai ••••••, (a resident) of Āgaiyārkiḻavaṉ-perunteru in Narikkuḍi in Śeṅkuḍināḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvaṟtticciri komāṟavaṉmarāṉa tiṟipuvaṉaccakkiṟavatti konermai koṇṭā
ṉ śrī varuṣam cuntara pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu varuṣam Etir cā varuṣam cakārttam 1000 4 100 10 6- ṉ mel
cellā niṉṟa vikāri varuṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 9 nāḷ Ācūrnāṭṭuk kacattalāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyanallūril
nāyiṉār koteṇṭarāmīcuramuṭaiya nayiṉār koyilil ci paṇṭārak kāriyañ ceyvārkaḷom ceṅku
ṭināṭṭu narikkuṭiyil Ākaiyārkiḻavaṉ perunteruvil Eṉṉaippeṟṟāḷu tiruviṭai
nantāviḷakku Ivaikku palicaiyil na
ṭantu varumpaṭi ṇṭikaikku mutalāka mutal nāḷukkum palicai mātam nāṉṟu
tirunāḷukku Iraṇṭu poṉ viḻukkāṭu poṉ 5 100 3 10 2 Āka 7
viḷakku Iraṇṭukku nāḷ kku Āka mātam Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Āka I
paṇam nālum Ippaṭikkum policai Inta kku cantira Ātittarvarai
ṭata
ntu mu pacuvaiyum ko
pirāmāṇaṉaiyuṅ koṉṟa paṭṭikku
taṉmattukku Āṇ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇ
Ippaṭikku koṉāṭu Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
